columns.title: Be concise and clear
columns.content:
- What is the purpose of the invitation and who is it for
- Avoid lengthy intros, complex jargon, and wordy sentences.

columns.title: Be personal and inviting
columns.content:
- Use a warm, welcoming tone that feels like a chat over coffee​
- Avoid formal expressions, e.g., ”Dear guest," "we hereby," and "You.”​  
However, do not become too informal and use expressions like ”Hey there!"

columns.title: Highlight the event's benefit for the recipient
columns.content: - Emphasize what our clients will learn or enjoy during the event
